package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_type_outside_service_package: Concrete use-case services declared outside `service` or `services` packages in layered web-service repos.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule183NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule183NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule183NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario183Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule183NegativeService, input Rule183NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
